sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
targets = []
for n in nodes:

        b = n['boundary']
        row = (b[0][0] + b[2][0]) // 2
        col = (b[0][1][1]) // 2
        targets.append((row, col))
print("Green crosses at:", targets)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, col': c} for r, c in targets])
